rows.label: qev013202_MSG0002
rows.name:
H-Hiiiiieeeeh!! The b-black!
The black Doll's... Minion!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_JNK0010
rows.name: Assure

rows.label: qev013202_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Bates that you are a friend.

rows.label: qev013202_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev013202_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the black Doll.

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0004
rows.name: Eh...? You're... [ST:playername ]...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Did Captain Corondas
tell you to come save me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0006
rows.name:
The black Doll is... No,
that thing's no Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's a mechanical demon! There's
no way something of this world
could move like that!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0008
rows.name:
Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!
It's! It's coming!! Dammit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0009
rows.name: Hah... Hah... ...Are you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0010
rows.name: ...[ST:playername ]? Did you come to save me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Thanks. The black Doll's minions
are walking all over the place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0012
rows.name:
I was in trouble because I couldn't
get back on foot. And my body is
shaking... my legs are giving out...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't think I can fight. Just seeing
those things makes me remember it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Please, defeat all of
its minions around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0015
rows.name:
If you do that, I think I can somehow
make it to NLA. Please... Let me go
back to a safe place quickly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0016
rows.name:
...I didn't want you to see
me looking so pathetic...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0017
rows.name:
But I'm just scared... When I close my
eyes, the image of that monster appears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Please... save me. Defeat
all of its minions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0019
rows.name: ...How is it? Are they all gone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_JNK0030
rows.name: Reassure

rows.label: qev013202_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Bates that the area is secure.

rows.label: qev013202_JNK0040
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev013202_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell Bates to stay alert because of the black Doll.

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0020
rows.name:
Your words have a strange warmth
that puts people at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0021
rows.name:
I see... I should be able
to get back like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0022
rows.name:
I need to return to safe NLA
quickly... I don't want to stay
in a place like this anymore...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0023
rows.name: What!? So it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0024
rows.name:
...I see. It left. But just like you
said, I can't let my guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0025
rows.name:
Then I have to head back now. If that
thing comes back... we're done for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Thank you so much for saving
me. ...I'm going now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0027
rows.name:
Heh... If the Captain sees me
in this pathetic state, he'll
do more than just yell at me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0028
rows.name:
The Captain gave me a harsh
punch. Told me not to tremble
against an opponent like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0029
rows.name:
Thanks to that, I woke up a
bit. My body still shakes when
I remember it, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013202_MSG0030
rows.name:
I have to recover quickly and continue
exploring the unknown world as a
proud member of Corondas's team![ST:wait ]
